title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AWS Cloud Architecture & Services
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 12 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 93.3%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 83.3%, and average score is 7.32/10. Total training hours are 224 and scaled cost is 11. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AWS Cloud Architecture & Services' has been completed with a total of 12 trainees. The overall attendance rate is high at 93.3%, and the completion rate is perfect at 100%. However, the pass rate of 83.3% indicates that a portion of trainees did not meet the required performance threshold, contributing to an overall effectiveness classification of Risk.
insights: AWS Cloud Architecture & Services has an effectiveness score of 85.76 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
2 high-priority L&D NORM flags were triggered.

The average score of 7.32/10 reflects a solid understanding of the course material among most trainees, but it also highlights that some trainees are struggling, as indicated by the need for 1:1 support for two individuals.
The feedback rating of 4.71/5 suggests that the course content and delivery were well-received overall, yet the effectiveness score of 85.76 indicates room for improvement in training outcomes.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, consider reviewing course content and delivery methods to address the gaps that may be affecting the pass rate, ensuring that all trainees can achieve the desired learning outcomes.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
